mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.order_status = '3' THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as todayReservationRevenue, COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) as todayConsumptionRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT r.player_id) as todayActivePlayers, COUNT(DISTINCT c.player_id) as todayConsumers FROM sys_reservation r RIGHT JOIN sys_consume c ON 1=1 WHERE DATE(r.reserve_date) = CURDATE() OR DATE(c.consume_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.order_status = '3' THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as weekReservationRevenue, COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) as weekConsumptionRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT r.player_id) as weekActivePlayers, COUNT(DISTINCT c.player_id) as weekConsumers, COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id) as weekNewMembers FROM sys_reservation r RIGHT JOIN sys_consume c ON 1=1 RIGHT JOIN sys_member m ON 1=1 WHERE (r.reserve_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) OR c.consume_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) OR m.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY))

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.order_status = '3' THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as monthReservationRevenue, COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) as monthConsumptionRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT r.player_id) as monthActivePlayers, COUNT(DISTINCT c.player_id) as monthConsumers, COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id) as monthNewMembers, COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) as monthNewPlayers FROM sys_reservation r RIGHT JOIN sys_consume c ON 1=1 RIGHT JOIN sys_member m ON 1=1 RIGHT JOIN sys_player p ON 1=1 WHERE (r.reserve_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) OR c.consume_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) OR m.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) OR p.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY))

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_store WHERE status = '0') as storeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_table_info WHERE status = '0') as tableCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_member WHERE status = '0') as memberCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_player WHERE status = '0') as playerCount

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.order_status = '3' THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as reservationAmount, COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) as consumptionAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.order_status = '3' THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) as totalAmount FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) as date FROM (SELECT 0 as n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) t ) d LEFT JOIN sys_reservation r ON DATE(r.reserve_date) = d.date AND (r.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL) LEFT JOIN sys_consume c ON DATE(c.consume_time) = d.date AND (c.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL) GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.create_time >= d.date AND m.create_time < DATE_ADD(d.date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN m.member_id END), 0) as newMembers, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.consume_time >= d.date AND c.consume_time < DATE_ADD(d.date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN c.player_id END), 0) as activeMembers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_member WHERE status = '0') as totalMembers FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) as date FROM (SELECT 0 as n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) t ) d LEFT JOIN sys_member m ON m.status = '0' AND (m.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL) LEFT JOIN sys_consume c ON (c.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL) GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date DESC

SELECT s.store_name, s.address, s.phone, s.business_hours, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_table_info WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status = '0') as tableCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_table_info WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status = '1') as busyTableCount FROM sys_store s WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.order_status = '3' THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalReservationRevenue, COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) as totalConsumptionRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT r.order_no) as totalOrders, COUNT(DISTINCT c.consume_no) as totalConsumes FROM sys_reservation r RIGHT JOIN sys_consume c ON 1=1 WHERE (r.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL) AND (c.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalMembers, COALESCE(SUM(m.total_points), 0) as totalPoints, COALESCE(SUM(m.available_points), 0) as availablePoints, COALESCE(AVG(m.total_consumption), 0) as avgConsumption FROM sys_member m WHERE m.status = '0' AND (m.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL)
SELECT m.player_name, m.player_phone, m.total_consumption FROM sys_member m WHERE m.status = '0' ORDER BY m.total_consumption DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT m.player_name, m.player_phone, m.total_points FROM sys_member m WHERE m.status = '0' ORDER BY m.total_points DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT tt.type_name, SUM(c.amount) as revenue FROM sys_consume c LEFT JOIN sys_table_info ti ON c.table_id = ti.table_id LEFT JOIN sys_table_type tt ON ti.type_id = tt.type_id WHERE (c.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL) GROUP BY tt.type_name ORDER BY revenue DESC

SELECT ti.table_no, tt.type_name, COUNT(DISTINCT r.order_no) as orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT c.consume_no) as consumeCount FROM sys_table_info ti LEFT JOIN sys_table_type tt ON ti.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT JOIN sys_reservation r ON ti.table_id = r.table_id AND r.order_status = '3' LEFT JOIN sys_consume c ON ti.table_id = c.table_id WHERE ti.status = '0' AND (ti.store_id = #{storeId} OR #{storeId} IS NULL) GROUP BY ti.table_no, tt.type_name ORDER BY ti.table_no
